Be part of our Election Day Bake Sale! 
Bring baked goods or volunteer to sell treats to
voters at St. Cloud Elementary on Election Day. 
Scan code or use link to SIGN UP!
All proceeds go to help fund 5 grade activitiesth

$5,000 Honored National Teaching Award
Lift up your teacher and share your story on what makes
them so special! To learn more and nominate your teacher,
scan the QR code below:
honored.org/nominate
